differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) secondary to an underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
next_steps: Perform flow cytometry for PNH clones (CD55/CD59 expression on neutrophils and monocytes)
Bone marrow biopsy including aspirate for morphology, cytogenetics, and flow cytometry
Measure serum haptoglobin, reticulocyte count, iron studies, and copper/ceruloplasmin levels
Assess serum vitamin B12, folate, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Check serum ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor, and triglycerides to evaluate for HLH criteria
Consult hematology for urgent review of peripheral blood smear by a hematopathologist
